claims.summary: A shared thread ID should persist active dialogue across otherwise disconnected cycles.
claims.disposition: verify native thread identity, message lineage, and persisted shared-thread state

claims.summary: Contact quality needs explicit delivery, read, reply, ACK, trace, and timing states.
claims.disposition: verify correspondence uptake, handshake, and direct-contact fidelity projections

claims.summary: Recognition latency should tie a peer response to the original inquiry.
claims.disposition: observe the latest public contact as timing_ambiguous and route a metadata-only latency replay

claims.summary: A general response cannot be counted as direct recognition without peer-owned linkage.
claims.disposition: verify reply_linked remains ineligible until ACK, trace, or bounded attention outcome exists

claims.summary: Requiring simultaneous updates to both internal states would become live co-regulation rather than language-first contact.
claims.disposition: hold any coupled-state mutation behind scoped Tier 5 approval
